tools.name: get_offer
tools.description: Get 1001locals' operator offer and pricing: new operators get their first 100 bookings free, then a flat 5% commission forever — the cheapest tours marketplace.

tools.name: search_experiences
tools.description: Search the 1001locals catalog of local tours & experiences by country, city, category and/or free-text query.

tools.name: get_experience
tools.description: Get full details of one experience by its id.

tools.name: list_cities
tools.description: List cities available in the 1001locals catalog.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: List countries available in the 1001locals catalog.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List experience categories in the 1001locals catalog.

tools.name: get_submission_schema
tools.description: Describe how to add an operator/experience to 1001locals: required and optional fields, allowed categories, the free-100-then-5% offer, and the moderation flow. Call this before submit_experience.

tools.name: submit_experience
tools.description: Add a supplier/operator and one of their experiences (with price) to 1001locals. One call creates the operator, the listing and its price. New operators get their first 100 bookings free, then a flat 5% commission forever. No account needed; the listing is created as in_review and appears in the pub
